approaches_tried.name: Asymptotic Freedom Running
approaches_tried.finding: α_s runs with energy; Ω_Λ/Z matches at M_Z to 0.3%
approaches_tried.note: Running doesn't explain WHY the match occurs at M_Z

approaches_tried.name: GUT Boundary Conditions
approaches_tried.finding: Standard GUT running doesn't directly give Ω_Λ/Z

approaches_tried.name: Holographic Connection
approaches_tried.finding: Plausible that strong force couples to horizon, but not rigorous

approaches_tried.name: SU(3) Group Theory
approaches_tried.finding: No simple Casimir relation gives α_s

approaches_tried.name: Entropy Connection
approaches_tried.finding: No clear entropy argument for α_s = Ω_Λ/Z

approaches_tried.name: Dimensional Transmutation
approaches_tried.finding: Λ_QCD scale doesn't obviously connect to Ω_Λ/Z

promising_leads.interpretation: EM couples quadratically, strong couples linearly to Z
